name: articraft
description: Create articulated 3D assets through Articraft's programmatic, LLM-powered code-generation workflow for semantic parts, robust geometry, physical joints, and large-scale datasets.

interface.longDescription: Articraft transforms articulated 3D asset creation into a programmatic code-generation workflow powered by LLMs. Engineered for large-scale dataset generation, it helps Codex launch Articraft-managed generation, including no-key Codex CLI runs, then validate, curate, and inspect objects with semantic parts, robust geometry, and physical joints while bypassing heavyweight manual tools.
